game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.description: Welcome to Hotel Dash: P5 Edition! You're managing a busy hotel where guests arrive seeking service. Your goal is to satisfy their needs quickly before their patience runs out. Check guests into rooms, serve them food from the kitchen, and keep rooms clean. Each satisfied guest earns you coins. Meet the level's coin target within the time limit while keeping dissatisfied guests to a minimum. Progress through 5 increasingly challenging levels to become the ultimate hotel manager!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate the selection cursor between guests, rooms, reception, kitchen, and staff members.
Space: Select the highlighted entity. Select a guest first, then select a service location to assign tasks. Select staff (Monica) to clean dirty rooms.
Shift: Cancel current selection and return to neutral state.
Enter: Start the game from the main menu.
Esc: Pause/Unpause during gameplay.
R: Return to start screen from game over.
